## API Key Configuration

## Privacy And Safety

- Do not paste full API keys.
- Do not paste `.env` files.
- Do not paste local AppData files containing keys, cache, or watchlist data.
- Mask keys like `abcd...wxyz` if a maintainer needs to know which key was used.
